review_text:
Troys rubbish removal Cairns did a rubbish removal from one of the vans today..
Seems a friendly place.
Relaxing atmosphere 😌

Must mention reception staff Noud provided us with excellent customer service, to be noted we have been Caravanning around Australia for the past 12 months and this is the best service we have received. Great Location, walking distance to the shopping village and only 15 - 20 minutes to Cairns CBD. Highly recommended
Tight park for larger vans . Great having ensuite each site.

We wanted to check out cairns for a few days and everything was booked out so this was our lest resort….. BIG MISTAKE. The en-suite site is outdated like the 1970s ( I don’t mind whatever) but there is mould on the roof from no ventilation, the sink was broken and had a towel under it to soak the water up which then leaked all over the floor and got wet feet everytime we went to pee! Toilet wouldn’t flush properly and The bins that are situated around the park are overflowing with rubbish!! And the road noise is horrible….  This park needs a good going over but we get what we paid for!!!! Definitely never again 👎🏼👎🏼
Under new management. Very friendly owner and clean amenities. Every site has personal amenities.
Very quiet. Goid rates. Close to shops pet friendly

We were treated extremely well by Robert at a very sad time.e of our lives. The cleaning leaves a little to be desired.  Other than that we were very thankful to get accom near our family & the price was reasonable...
Great little park,had great amenities, close to everything you would need for a comfortable stay

Shameful manager who is a bully, a judge and puts down people he doesn't like. He has high anger anxiety and depression issues and the park is a mess the has bad water drainage and floods all over. Manager thinks its paradise and we should be grateful. He charges different prices depending on who he likes.  He Does Not Manage the Park but bullies those he doesn't like. Shame shame , first van Park coming from South and that's what you get.
Love the clean ensuite sites.  Great price.  Always found Robert a good host and helps with backing the van onto site.  Stayed here many times as we have family close by.

Great place to stay. The park is nice and quiet, its family friendly, affordable and very clean. The manager is very approachable and happy to answer any questions you have. We have stayed here twice so far and will definitely stay again next time we are up that way.

Great location, Close to everything.
Management Rob is great to deal with and is very flexible to suit my work needs.
Cabins are clean and very affordable.
Couldn't recommend highly enough!
Lovely quiet Park. Very well maintained. Robert the manager couldn't be more helpful. We stayed for 4 weeks and had our van stored prior.  Definitely recommend this Park.

excellent help with reversing into site - made the job painless.  Ensuite was bonus and good not to have to share with a lot of other people.  park was well kept even though we didn't use other facilities.  were advised of all local eateries/ supermarkets, which makes life easier.
Robert was very helpful, friendly and I found the Silky Oak cabin to be just perfect for my needs. The park is very organised and close to most things one needs. 🙂 I would happily stay here again

We have stayed for 3 weeks.  We found everything to be as advertised. Cabins are clean, park is tidy, only 15 mins drive to Cairns.  We found a fresh coconut and pawpaw,  that was growing in the park to enjoy.
Management team is friendly and we will stay again.

The park is very clean and tidy|Rob was most friendly and showed us the ropes when we checked in.|Some suggestions....|The camp kitchen needs hot water or a kettle.|The most annoying thing we found was the gardener would start his noisy blower every morning at 7.20 for 10 mins or so, surely this noisy work could be done later in the morning.

Great well kept park concrete awning slab all with onsuite.
Nice n quite 👌
